name: Soul of Sword
desc: Sharp sword qi covered by soft moonlight. When the soft and strong meet, a powerful relic is born.

name: Millenary Dream
desc: Waking up from a millenary dream, the swords exude an aura of solemnity. Only the one proven worthy can wield them.

name: Dual Swords
desc: Edges brightening as snow, tassels flowing like stars, when the dual swords combine, the world shall be shaken.

name: Nebula Dual
desc: It's said that when the swords were drawn, rainbows will surge in the sky.

name: Guqin Sound
desc: Melodious sound flows out from the guqin. The notes, like butterflies, hover their wings and dance in the wind.

name: Decadant Music
desc: A thousand of guqins in a thousand people's eyes because it appears differently to different people.

name: Stringless Sound
desc: People in Cloud believe that the most powerful guqin can be enchanting. It's called Stringless Sound.

name: Stringless Guqin
desc: The reason it is called the Stringless Guqin is that it is played using spirit and heart.

name: Newborn Feather
desc: I'm a lonely little feather floating in a water blue dream. When can I wake up from the dream and start a new life?

name: Dawn Hatchling
desc: I grow up in the Tower of Zen but I also want to see the world outside. That man seems lonely. I'll go with him.

name: Blue Messenger
desc: The man gave me to his beloved niece as a gift. Every time she gazes into the sky, I feel so close to her heart.

name: Blue Phoenix's Letter
desc: Dear master, I've grown up. No matter how far I travel, I remember the road home and take the message back.

name: Glory Soul
desc: Orlando carries with him many marvelous inventions. They are all Flynn's works back in Federal Military Academy.

name: Glory Medal
desc: This badge has a built-in GPS that tracks your trace all the time, and the sapphire is actually a camera.

name: Glory Pen
desc: This pen can function as a recorder and the ink in the holder is deadly poisonous.

name: Glory Umbrella
desc: This umbrella consists of canopy made of bullet-proof fabric and a mini electromagnetic gun disguised as the pole.

name: Lonely Years
desc: Years passed and I get used to loneliness. Then you broke in the quiet manor, lighting up the fire in my heart.

name: Lonely Drink
desc: I believe in you, but the seal is collapsing, I don't know how long I can stand...

name: Vintage Entanglement
desc: Breaking the chain, I took the first step in the world outside. I will travel alone and find you.

name: Victory Wine
desc: May this happy reunion always stay in our hearts. Let's make the covenant once again, a bond of loyalty.

name: Hare and March
desc: I'm March Hare, not because I'll get mad in March but I was born on a sunny afternoon in March long long ago.

name: Hare and Secret
desc: I have a magical pocket watch which can take me to anyone's dream. Yes, I'm a hare who knows lots of secrets!

name: Hare and Dream
desc: Although I've wandered through different dreams, I've never had one myself, what's the feeling of dreaming?

name: Hare and Destiny
desc: You want to know what does the one you like dreamed last night? Give me a carrot, I might consider telling you!

name: Spirit of Magic
desc: It's said that only the most innocent child can see the Illusion Elf. I see you now. Am I the most innocent one?

name: Book of Dreams
desc: Oh magic book, can you make me a candy castle? Sweet candies, delicious chocolates, and also marshmallow bunnies!

name: Star Moon Covenant
desc: The magic covenant has been signed when I see you. Magic mark on the souls now. We'll be together forever!

name: Star Magic Circle
desc: The hexagram I wove with moonlight and love is shining in the dark. Where are you? Here? Or in my heart?

name: Primal Bow
desc: Crafted by the first wood elf, its power and appearance vary among different wielders.

name: Retribution Arrow
desc: When the young Chloris first gained the Ice Flame Bow, elegant engravings appear on the bow.

name: Sunk Feather
desc: Chloris spent a great amount of time meditating but still cannot awaken the Ice Flame Bow. He's confused and upset.

name: Ice Flame Bow
desc: Watered by his tears, the bow awakens and releases arrows which break time and space. There he sees Floral.

name: Spirit of Time
desc: Nothing is longer than time, because it never ends; nothing is shorter than time, because it's always too late

name: Childlike Magic
desc: Young Yvette always falls asleep holding her wand. She dreams that one day mum's wand will bring her to happiness.

name: Momentary Wand
desc: Time may change the face, but not the heart and affection. Like the sun, hope will always shine upon us.

name: Wand of Time
desc: When time flies backward, we sometimes want the magic of time relapse... But we gain strength in memory.

name: Twin Serenade
desc: It's fated that we can not talk when we are awake, but I can feel your song through my silver tiara.

name: Wood Elves' Ballad
desc: We elves are the guardian of the forest. As a duty, you sing the regal ballad.

name: Century Symphony
desc: After centuries of sleep, he suddenly appears in my life. The laughter and tears are a symphony in my blood.

name: Diamond Aria
desc: Wood elf's dormant chant once again infuses into the holy gem. It's a story of forgiving and waiting

name: Spirit of Illusion
desc: Ever since I was conscious, I can create illusions. Power, fortune, or beauty, I can give you everything

name: Reflection of Truth
desc: I'm just a mirror, but I'm unpredictable. I love reality, so I'll never conceal anything from you.

name: Mirror of Illusion
desc: I'm just a mirror, people see themselves in me. I can reveal your deepest lust and delusion...

name: Mirror of Forest
desc: I'm just a mirror. I can both reflect reality and create illusions. I named myself Eli when I was deserted.

name: Deer's Whisper
desc: On the Mount Mango, a deer holds a flower in its mouth, with a boy listening to the sound of willows.

name: Deer and Willow
desc: Nature gives the deer a nimble body and bright eyes. And the boy studies from the beauty of nature.

name: Deer and Brook
desc: Beauty is never fixed and you should always follow your heart. After a talk, the deer's eyes were opened.

name: Deer and Cliff
desc: The season may change, but flowers will bloom if there is spring in your heart. The boy never forgets this place.

name: Cat Says · Vagrancy
desc: I'm a black cat with lapis lazuli colored eyes. Many praised the color of my eyes, but only she took me home.

name: Cat Says · Encounter
desc: When I was abandoned, I thought I would never see that shy girl again. Until I met Mr. Mindless and Mr. Unhappy.

name: Cat Says · Afternoon
desc: Actually Mr. Mindless is smart and Mr. Unhappy is happy. Meow, Nina smiles. I'll make fun of Mr. Mindless today.

name: Cat Says · Time
desc: They won't stay with me in the afternoon. I know it but I just cannot help waiting on the windowsill.

name: Snow on Begonia
desc: At the beginning of February, snow falls quietly. The little begonia sapling stands firm in the wind.

name: Reflection of Begonia
desc: The color is washed away, leaving her pure white flowers behind. The little child was outlining begonia with ink.

name: Lovesick Begonia
desc: Emotions stir deep in her heart. Under the begonia tree, she only thinks of the war in the North.

name: Night Begonia
desc: It's the 23rd summer, the begonia still blooms as always, but the road home seems endless.

name: Ivy in the Manor
desc: Full of energy, Mount Mango is a place immortals always visit. But hidden in the mist, it's secret to common people

name: Grass Basket
desc: Time seems to forget this place. Liang Jing and the boy spent the whole summer enjoying the scenery here.

name: Rattan Case
desc: Years later when the boy and Liang Jing meet again, both their hearts and faces are like before.

name: Willow Casket
desc: I was lost in Mant Mango and when I returned home, the green yard there is dilapidated.

name: Night Prelude
desc: In the midsummer night, dreamy dance shines in the girl's eyes and prelude comes out from the case.

name: Toy March
desc: In the noisy courtyard, the metal clockwork is wound and the machine starts playing a march of toys.

name: Cliff Polka
desc: A stubborn girl was dancing alone at the cliff. The skirt hemline brought about the ruby polka.

name: Stardust Waltz
desc: The stardusts are blue and deep. On the warm palm, our past is sealed. Listen, the bell rings the waltz of fate.

name: Sugar Kiss
desc: As my illusion was broken like a sugar coating, I tasted the flavor of growth.

name: Fondant Bow
desc: Cream lace with raspberries, this is Yvette's favorite hairpin! The actress of Raspberry Princess has the same one

name: Raspberry Mousse
desc: The rabbit plate rack looks familiar. Perhaps it's a real rabbit? Hush—let's pretend we didn't notice.

name: Fairy Tale Tea
desc: Lace tablecloth, rich black tea, and perfect dessert tower. Wear your favorite dress and be a part of the fairy tale

name: Scales of Blues
desc: In the foggy town, pentatonic scale comes from a window with a beautiful chord like the sigh of a poet.

name: Sad Jazz
desc: Jazz is a sad song served in a cup in the dim light. The drunk, holding her broken dream, is waiting for the dawn

name: Wordless Song
desc: When she wakes up, everything is buried in the dusty attic. Oblivion is a lock without key

name: Saxophone Poem
desc: The kid with the saxophone on her back looked back. She would forget everything: Name, Tears, Hatred... and  Sin.

name: Ambition
desc: When he was young, he was a scholar. When war broke out, he enlisted in the army.

name: Copper Fish Tally
desc: His heart is as hard as his armor. He swears to recover the lost city so that the dead will not die in vain.

name: General's Order
desc: The well-trained army now awaits. He is talented both in making schemes in the camp and fighting on the frontline.

name: Phoenix Sword
desc: Fearlessly, he charges. He wields the swords ruthlessly like the frost and elegantly like the phoenix

name: Orchid Leaf
desc: The flower is sweet and the leaf is slender. The ambitious 18-year-old young man is in the capital alone.

name: Red Bean Seed
desc: Red bean is the token of lovesickness. In January last year, we met in the snow and fell at first sight

name: Willow Twig
desc: When the willow withers and flowers fall, will you be back? Willow is the symbol of separation.

name: Orchid Under Moon
desc: Like the lofty orchid, at the age of 25, the boy enlisted in the army to serve his country

name: Memory Spark
desc: Kimi's childhood promise is carved in time. She's been learning to grow up and protecting the memories.

name: Flickering Meteor
desc: Lit sparkler and you'll have a star in your hands. Once the light fades, will you remember the happiness?

name: Snowy Night Sakura
desc: Kimi saw these spherical fireworks for the first time in a photo at home. They lit up the smile of her parents.

name: Time Flower Rain
desc: She walked to her father with a trophy in the fireworks. Time never stops. She had no choice but to go forward.

name: Nice Tune
desc: Zhu Yuxian used to hear tweedle in his dreams when he was young. It sounded sad but he couldn't understand.

name: Bamboo Whistle
desc: As time flies, no songs can be heard in the Zhu Palace. Only a few chirps of birds left with a waning moon.

name: Jade Flute
desc: When Ming Shuiyuan walks out of the Mansion Voyage Moon, it's deep night, but she is stopped by a sad flute.

name: Phoenix Flute
desc: The flute lingers on the snow-covered branch then fades away under misty moonlight. The Mansion is now empty.

name: Beginning of a Long Night
desc: At 6, Louie owned his first knight spear. Why do we have to fight? You'll know when you grow up, said Master Lionel

name: Starry Night Goggles
desc: At 14, Louie left Black Water City and became a mercenary. He wants to fight for his faith.

name: Windy Night Helmet
desc: At 17, Louie came to Cloud, a place he never saw. Vast flower field, warm sunshine, and that girl who saved him.

name: Dark Night Motor
desc: At 24, Louie wore the white robe of Nameless Order and held the knight spear, leaving Bluebird and the past behind

name: Chain Broken
desc: Yue's skills were taught by her parents, though her father said if possible, he would not give his glaive to her.

name: Black Iron Edge
desc: When Yue Qianshuang first took the short blade from her father, it's so heavy that she didn't like it.

name: Wind and Thunder Sword
desc: The glaive was the last thing Father gave her. When she first saw death, she knew the meaning of this weapon.

name: Snow Sword
desc: Yue carefully cleans the weapon. Today she's just as sharp as it is. She'll kill carnage and protect the peace.

name: Trail of Stars
desc: The star identifier records that nebulas reflect light through prism in the distant universe.

name: Stars Prism
desc: It's said that everyone has a star. Some people's fates are on track, while others' are lost in the mist.

name: Quiet Sky
desc: The star identifier developed by Flynn and Orlando is kept in the observatory of Federal Military Academy.

name: Nebula Illustrations
desc: Before graduation, Flynn and Orlando recorded the starry night as a souvenir. Orlando made them an album later

name: Blue Sky Chant
desc: Bai Yongxi grew up in book piles and showed great talent since young. People put high expectation on him.

name: Mountain and River Volume
desc: However, the young king got tired of the pedantic atmosphere in the capital. He set off for the world outside.

name: Agelong Volume
desc: Later, Jinjin received a letter from her brother, 'You will never know this world until you see it for yourself.'

name: Morning Cloud Volume
desc: Years of history are gone like a dream. All the great dynasties left nothing but the words on the books.

name: Time in the Forest
desc: The dwarfs live in Pigeon Forest and like everything here… But some of them want to see the outside world.

name: Remember the Moment
desc: The dwarfs are good at making jewelry. Their works are exquisite and delicate but also easily neglected in styling.

name: Recall the Past
desc: Debbie is a special kid. She prefers clothes to jewelry. She likes reading books under trees.

name: Blue Clock
desc: No one loves Pigeon Forest more than Debbie. That's why she has to leave here before she becomes a great designer.

name: Destined Twins
desc: Every generation, elves will have 2 guardians who protect the Pigeon Forest in turn, a Sword and a Moon.

name: Dream Awakening
desc: Chloris is the first guardian and Lakris didn't appear under the Life Tree till Elf Queen went missing.

name: Crescent and Flowers
desc: Chloris and Lakris cannot get to see each other, but they are connected through the fate mark.

name: Dawn Harp
desc: When Lakris is asleep, he can tell from the harp by Chloris that everything is ok in Pigeon Forest.

name: Dream of Puppet
desc: I dreamed that I lost my will like a puppet and what's left is only fake bubbles and broken faith.

name: Hope Badge
desc: I cannot be trapped in yesterday's sorrow. I have to bury the pain and say farewell to the old times.

name: Lonely Doll
desc: I cannot talk or listen, I can feel no joy or sadness. I can only stuff the nightmare into my belly with the cotton

name: Shimmer in the Box
desc: Light casts in through the seam. I thought it could be hope, but as days pass by, there are silent nights only

name: Bear Phantom
desc: The story of Renieve white bears is very popular. The girls who get to see it will win love in the next year.

name: Pearl Bear
desc: A magician gave Bobo a little bear bag strung by pearls. There's a candy lay in it every time it opened.

name: Stardream Bear
desc: Two little bears came to Bobo and put stars into her arms. The shimmering starlight reminds her 14th birthday.

name: Guardian Bear
desc: In countless dreams, Bobo puts her head on the white bear's chest. Its embrace is as warm as her father's.

name: Infinity Contraption
desc: From a gadget in the pocket to the huge city walls, Clan Ming's contraption skills cannot be matched.

name: Trinket Lock
desc: The Clan holds the principle of defense over offense, but Ming Shuiyuan still goes to quell the southern rebellion.

name: Fog Barrier
desc: Covered by the fog, the mech army captured the thirteen rebellious cities in a blink.

name: Ocean Scale
desc: The sophisticated machine of wood assumes the shape of Xuan Wu; Snake is its sword and the turtle is its armor.

name: Breath of Ice
desc: In the north, it is always snowing, leaving the snowy mountains in deep quiet.

name: Frozen Sea
desc: Instead of identity, the knight spirit is a deep belief. Even deeply frozen, it will never fall.

name: Wanderer in Snow
desc: The snow cannot disturb the peace on the snowfield, but the fire war can.

name: Polar Traveler
desc: As peace fades away, so does the knight spirit. Abandon the name so that faith and home can be protected.

name: Original Will
desc: Looking at the uncut satin evolves into gorgeous clothes under the spotlight always touches her.

name: First Voice
desc: Carefully takes down the first evening dress and plays the first note of the movement. The girl's dance here begins.

name: Dream Journey
desc: Wears beloved high heels on the velvet stool. This girl's battle gear will secure the victory on the new journey.

name: Promise of Future
desc: Dress up before the mirror and follow the unicorn into that halo of the dream.

name: Childhood reminiscence
desc: Childhood is a magnificent fantasy land, and I hope to wander in it and never have to experience separation.

name: Carefree Dream
desc: Hanging in a colorful dream, reminiscing carefree childhood, she smiled in a midnight sleep.

name: Romantic flower language
desc: The cute cat puppet dressed up as a bouquet is the most memorable birthday present she has ever received.

name: Sunflower blossom
desc: Open the umbrella and take a family photo. Let the smile freeze on the photo. Let the memory last forever.

name: Chapters of Epic
desc: All the stories begin with an adventure. The world is spinning and life changes at this moment.

name: Miracle freeze frame
desc: I have met many friends and experienced twists and turns. Every important moment became an unforgettable memory.

name: Wings of dreams
desc: She once cried in the dark night, she once hovered in the mist, but a brave heart can never be chained by the fate.

name: Great era
desc: Bury the past with silence. Weave the future with dreams. Write the poems of times on the fertile soil of miracles.

name: Memory Corridor
desc: Memory is a long and dreary corridor. It doesn't seem to end and there are dangers everywhere.

name: Clutched Tight
desc: He stands before the window, the city lights reflected in his eyes. People would kill for his money.

name: Wedge of Darkness
desc: The number 7 reagent is put in the suitcase as the peculiar trade is carried out. He savors the tension in the air.

name: Sonic Shadow
desc: When speed is raised to the limit, body and soul seem to separate. The sensation from this tear is intoxicating.

name: Nascent Dream
desc: The aroma of the rose can be smelled in the spring breeze. It opens up softly, within it a crystallized dream.

name: Rosy Poetry
desc: Fierce winds couldn't blow it away; rainstorms couldn't damage its beauty. It quietly strives towards the dream.

name: Immaculate Crown
desc: The land basks in the sun. It hears the cries of praise. Amidst the praises, it flaunts its petals.

name: Holy Scepter
desc: Even the most beautiful flower will die to a gale. But autumn is still far away, so cherish its beauty while it lasts.

name: Cry of the Crow
desc: She once saw the dawn at the mountaintop. A golden light came from the sky, which could make everything silent.

name: Key of the Universe
desc: Behind the mechanism was a mysterious universe, huge and profound. The door to another world had never been opened.

name: Crossbow of the Thought
desc: She always focused on what she was doing. Once she had set her goal, she would go forward without turning back.

name: Feather of the Lonely Bird
desc: Has the general in the play turned into a bird, flying over the mountains and rivers, seeing the prosperous world?

name: Early Winter Whisper
desc: Legend has it that the winter in the Pigeon Forest is so cold that the Dwarves have to pray together for survival.

name: Winter Rebirth
desc: Everything sleeps when the cold comes, but new hope is breeding under snow, and life will start all over again.

name: Winter Prayer
desc: The wind sends the scent of spring. The birds rest among the trees. A small wish germinates in Debbie's heart.

name: Treasures from Winter
desc: The bond of blood has never been severed by geography. They believe that spring will eventually come.

name: Early Childhood
desc: An unworldly genius is like a diamond in the rough, but tender wings will one day become full-fledged.

name: Cool Breeze Fan
desc: The first design Fu Su completed in the Ancient Pavilion is a simple fan, its utility being the biggest highlight.

name: Bottle of Brewed Dew
desc: Master’s assignments are unpredictable, for example, to learn the pharmacopoeia and brew dew throughout the summer.

name: Fresh Plum Blossom
desc: On the day Fu Su learns to make dew tea, his design is finally finished. He presents his work with a bamboo.

name: White Lotus
desc: The bright moon hangs in the sky. Beside the pond full of blooming lotus, two girls are putting lanterns on water.

name: Jade Lotus
desc: In the box lies a dangling lotus ornament. The two young girls put make-up for each other.

name: Ink Memory
desc: The two girls spent their picturesque teenage years together. They have never thought of separating.

name: Silken Memories
desc: The girl completes the unfinished paintings, adding flowers and two blue birds. She couldn't stop missing her friend.

name: Coordinate Globe
desc: As she received the Empress's order, she began thorough preparations, with the remote island included in the plan.

name: Compass of Time
desc: At sea, the first task is to know one's position. Her carefully calibrated compass always points the exact course.

name: Horizon Seer
desc: Always prepare before the storm. Sea's moods shift quickly, yet the lens shows every distant ripple in clear detail.

name: Perilous Expedition
desc: To sail seas few dare and reach lands rare, she must combine careful daily planning with clever ship engineering.
